12. ! [X0] : (is_indo_european(X0) | ~is_romance(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]

16. is_romance(french) [cnf transformation 4]
20. ~is_indo_european(french) [cnf transformation 9]
22. is_indo_european(french) [resolution 14,16]
23. $false [forward subsumption resolution 22,20]

% Termination reason: Refutation
